title: Neon Paper Cranes
premise: In the floating city of Hoshima, memories can be folded into paper familiars. When whole neighborhoods begin forgetting the same night, a rooftop courier and a disgraced archivist must trace the missing memories before the city votes to erase its own past.

characters.name: Mina Kisaragi
characters.goal: restore the memories stolen from the Lantern District
characters.fear: becoming emotionally numb like her missing mother

characters.name: Ren Vale
characters.goal: prove the public archive was deliberately corrupted
characters.fear: trusting evidence that has been altered

characters.name: Sora Nami
characters.goal: win control of the courier routes before the monsoon season
characters.fear: being valued only as a replacement for an older sibling

characters.name: Doctor Ilya Mori
characters.goal: keep memory-folding technology out of military hands
characters.fear: admitting that her own research enabled the crisis

characters.name: Kaede Voss
characters.goal: erase the city's shared trauma to prevent another civil war
characters.fear: that people will always choose revenge when given the truth

characters.name: Pico
characters.goal: recover the voice sealed inside its paper body
characters.fear: unfolding into someone the team no longer recognizes

episodes.title: A Signal Called Memory Versus Identity

beats.label: Cold open
beats.description: A routine mission exposes evidence that the season's central mystery is already moving. The oldest active question concerns why Sky Post erased a record connected to memory versus identity.

beats.label: Character choice
beats.description: Mina Kisaragi pursues “restore the memories stolen from the Lantern District” but must act through their fear of becoming emotionally numb like her missing mother; the decision highlights their impulsively compassionate nature.

beats.label: Relational pressure
beats.description: Ren Vale, representing Civic Archive, challenges the method rather than the goal. At tension 2.8/10, compromise carries a visible cost.

beats.label: Ending turn
beats.description: A new question takes control of the ending: why Sky Post erased a record connected to memory versus identity.

introduced_threads: why Sky Post erased a record connected to memory versus identity
relationship_changes: Their uneasy trust deepens: Mina Kisaragi ↔ Ren Vale shifts from +1 to +2.

episodes.title: Paper Wings over Family

beats.label: Cold open
beats.description: A small failure reveals a rule of the world that someone powerful has been hiding. The oldest active question concerns why Sky Post erased a record connected to memory versus identity.

beats.label: Character choice
beats.description: Pico pursues “recover the voice sealed inside its paper body” but must act through their fear of unfolding into someone the team no longer recognizes; the decision highlights their mischievous and pattern-obsessed nature.

beats.label: Relational pressure
beats.description: Sora Nami, representing Blue Kite Guild, challenges the method rather than the goal. At tension 3.4/10, compromise carries a visible cost.

beats.label: Ending turn
beats.description: A new question takes control of the ending: who benefits when Pico's fear becomes public.

introduced_threads: who benefits when Pico's fear becomes public
relationship_changes: Pico and Sora Nami form a fragile working connection.

episodes.title: A Signal Called The Ethics Of Forgetting

beats.label: Cold open
beats.description: A public celebration is interrupted by a private impossibility only the focus character recognizes. The oldest active question concerns why Sky Post erased a record connected to memory versus identity.

beats.label: Character choice
beats.description: Ren Vale pursues “prove the public archive was deliberately corrupted” but must act through their fear of trusting evidence that has been altered; the decision highlights their meticulous but quietly idealistic nature.

beats.label: Relational pressure
beats.description: Doctor Ilya Mori, representing Independent Fold Lab, challenges the method rather than the goal. At tension 4.8/10, compromise carries a visible cost.

beats.label: Ending turn
beats.description: A new question takes control of the ending: why Civic Archive erased a record connected to the ethics of forgetting.

introduced_threads: why Civic Archive erased a record connected to the ethics of forgetting
relationship_changes: Their shared secret deepens: Ren Vale ↔ Doctor Ilya Mori shifts from -1 to +0.

episodes.title: When Our Promise Fractured

beats.label: Cold open
beats.description: The apparent solution from the previous episode produces a more personal cost. The oldest active question concerns why Sky Post erased a record connected to memory versus identity.

beats.label: Character choice
beats.description: Doctor Ilya Mori pursues “keep memory-folding technology out of military hands” but must act through their fear of admitting that her own research enabled the crisis; the decision highlights their wry, evasive, and protective nature.

beats.label: Relational pressure
beats.description: Kaede Voss, representing Continuity Council, challenges the method rather than the goal. At tension 5.2/10, compromise carries a visible cost.

beats.label: Ending turn
beats.description: A new question takes control of the ending: the real cost of Doctor Ilya Mori's goal: keep memory-folding technology out of military hands.

introduced_threads: the real cost of Doctor Ilya Mori's goal: keep memory-folding technology out of military hands
relationship_changes: Their former partnership fractures: Doctor Ilya Mori ↔ Kaede Voss shifts from -4 to -5.

beats.label: Cold open

beats.label: Character choice
beats.description: Mina Kisaragi pursues “restore the memories stolen from the Lantern District” but must act through their fear of becoming emotionally numb like her missing mother; the decision highlights their impulsively compassionate nature.

relationship_changes: Their rivalry fractures: Mina Kisaragi ↔ Sora Nami shifts from -2 to -3.

episodes.title: Kaede Voss and the Unpaid Price

beats.label: Cold open
beats.description: Two factions pursue the same objective for incompatible reasons. The oldest active question concerns who benefits when Pico's fear becomes public.

beats.label: Character choice
beats.description: Kaede Voss pursues “erase the city's shared trauma to prevent another civil war” but must act through their fear of that people will always choose revenge when given the truth; the decision highlights their calm, sincere, and ruthlessly paternal nature.

beats.label: Relational pressure
beats.description: Pico, representing Unregistered Familiar, challenges the method rather than the goal. At tension 6.0/10, compromise carries a visible cost.

beats.label: Ending turn
beats.description: The cast resolves why Sky Post erased a record connected to memory versus identity, but the answer transfers responsibility to Kaede Voss.

introduced_threads: who benefits when Kaede Voss's fear becomes public
resolved_threads: why Sky Post erased a record connected to memory versus identity
relationship_changes: Their creator mystery deepens: Kaede Voss ↔ Pico shifts from -2 to -1.

episodes.title: When Our Promise Fractured

beats.label: Cold open
beats.description: The apparent solution from the previous episode produces a more personal cost. The oldest active question concerns who benefits when Pico's fear becomes public.

beats.label: Character choice
beats.description: Sora Nami pursues “win control of the courier routes before the monsoon season” but must act through their fear of being valued only as a replacement for an older sibling; the decision highlights their competitive and unexpectedly loyal nature.

beats.label: Relational pressure
beats.description: Mina Kisaragi, representing Sky Post, challenges the method rather than the goal. At tension 7.3/10, compromise carries a visible cost.

beats.label: Ending turn
beats.description: The secondary character admits a motive that changes the balance of trust.

relationship_changes: Their rivalry deepens: Sora Nami ↔ Mina Kisaragi shifts from -3 to -2.
